aljazeera.title: Millions attend funeral prayers for Iran’s Khamenei and family

monitor_the_situation.title: Israeli Attacks Kill Over 4,300 in Lebanon Since March 2
— S4 · Humanitarian · Beirut, Lebanon · 22h ago. Death toll from Israeli attacks on Lebanon since March 2 rises to 4,303, according to official reports.
Israeli Settlers Burn Restaurant Near Ramallah, West Bank

— S3 · Conflict · Ramallah, West Bank, Palestine · 2h ago. Israeli settlers broke into and burned a restaurant near Al-Zaytouna University in the West Bank, stealing money amid escalating attacks on Palestinians.
Houthi Attack Kills 14 Government Troops in Yemen
— S3 · Conflict · Yemen · 4h ago. An attack by Yemen's Houthi rebels resulted in the deaths of 14 government troops, indicating continued kinetic conflict in the region.
